{{Infobox character
| name = Veris Arelius
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
| name = Veris Arelius
| aliases = Veris
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlady of House Arelius, Underlord
| abilities = lightning-based techniques
| affiliations = House Arelius, Arelius family
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Veris Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Veris Arelius is a prominent member of [[House Arelius]], serving as the remaining [[Underlady]] of her family. She is described as a tall woman with long limbs, yellow hair styled in a braid, and sharp blue eyes. Her attire consists of dark blue, black, and white clothing, which are the colors associated with her house. During combat, she has demonstrated the ability to utilize storm [[madra]], such as launching a [[Forged]] hawk. As a representative of [[House Arelius]], Veris is deeply invested in the family's legacy and its survival following the loss of much of their ancestral territory. The house previously ruled a large portion of the [[Rosegold continent]] under the leadership of the late [[Monarch]] [[Tiberian Arelius]], but they have faced significant decline since his death. Veris views the success of her family members in various competitions as a positive omen for the house's future influence. She also acts in a strategic capacity, offering rewards and investments to potential allies to secure loyalty for the family's continued existence.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|As the remaining [[Underlady]] of [[House Arelius]], Veris Arelius serves as an [[Underlord]] who fights in honor of the late [[Tiberian Arelius]]. This yellow-haired woman with blue eyes, whose hair is styled in a braid, utilizes lightning-based techniques in combat. She is the cousin of [[Eithan]] and often communicates through a disembodied voice.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Veris Arelius]] is the remaining [[Underlady]] of [[House Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Veris Arelius]] has blue eyes and yellow hair tied into a braid.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Veris Arelius]] fights for the late [[Tiberian Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Veris is an Arelius woman.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Veris uses lightning-based techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Veris is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Veris Arelius]] is [[Eithan]]'s cousin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Veris Arelius]] communicates via a disembodied voice.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Veris Arelius]] is a member of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Cousin Veris, a pleasure to see you again."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Arelius family]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
